title: Valobreak
body:
# Valobreak

Use **Valobreak** to take a break from your rage inducing games and regain your energies by chilling with comfy and relaxing modpack! 

**Valobreak** is built with **Fabric**, together with a lot of optimization mods, it makes it pretty versatile  for a lot systems, despite the quantity of mods that it contains.
It tries to combine a lot of play styles, in a way that you can enjoy Minecraft at your own way and pace, it is also multiplayer friendly!

### Notes
- Some keybindings conflict with other mods, so be sure to change them in **Controls**
- There are some pre installed shaders which you can select on the shaders tab in **Video Settings**

## Content
- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod and some addons that allow you to trade and mount cobblemons
- New biome changes, but nothing to extreme to keep it familiar
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and some addons, perfect for engineers!
- Overhauled structures and new ones to explore
- Expanded farm content with [Farmer's delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)
- Fluid animations and particles
- Quality of life improvements
- Bunch of optimization
- Support for shaders
- Overhauled sounds
- Backpacks!
- ZOOM!
